title: ilex nitida subsp. bahiahondica
intro: Ilex nitida subsp. bahiahondica, also known as Bahia Holly, is a subspecies of holly native to northeastern Mexico. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bahia Holly include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help in reducing stress and improving cardiovascular health. Bahia Holly can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential interactions.
